title: Garlicky Fluffy Canadian Chicken Roast
description: A tender, sous‑vide chicken roast infused with ras el hanout, garlic, and a dash of maple for a show‑off Canadian flavor.
instructions: Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, ras el hanout, and minced garlic.
Place the seasoned chicken in a vacuum‑seal bag along with olive oil, maple syrup, chicken broth, and butter cubes.
Seal the bag using a vacuum sealer or the displacement method.
Cook the bagged chicken sous‑vide for 90–120 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches 150 °F (65 °C).
Remove the chicken from the bag and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat a skillet over medium‑high heat; sear the chicken for 1–2 minutes per side, adding thyme sprigs during the last minute.
Remove from heat, slice, and serve garnished with lemon zest.
